summary: Retest of Sahuja Interiors iteration 1 fixes. Both HIGH/MEDIUM UI bugs verified FIXED. Backend regression (pytest 8/8) and frontend regression (empty-form sonner toast, valid submission with success toast + form reset) all pass.

verified_fixes.evidence: data-testid='mobile-menu' computed style: backgroundColor=rgb(255,255,255), zIndex=100, opacity=1, position=fixed. Screenshot shows fully opaque white panel over scrolled section content — no bleed-through.

All 4 inputs (name/email/phone/message) have required=false. Clicking contact-submit-button on empty form surfaces sonner toast 'Please fill in your name, email and message.' — no HTML5 native tooltip.
pytest /app/backend/tests/test_contact_api.py => 8 passed in 0.93s. Logger now declared before routes. POST /api/contact returns 201 with id, GET /api/contacts excludes _id.

Submitted name=TEST_Retest User, email=test_retest@example.com, phone=+15555550123, message=... -> success sonner toast 'Thank you — we'll be in touch within 24 hours.' shown; form fields reset to empty.

critical_code_review_comments: Contact.jsx: duplicate sonner <Toaster /> would occur if another component also mounts one; currently only in Contact — fine, but a global Toaster in App root is cleaner.

server.py create_contact: broad try/except still converts Pydantic validation/Mongo errors into generic 500. FastAPI would already produce 422 for Pydantic; consider narrowing except to PyMongoError for clarity.
seed_data_creation: Inserted 1 TEST_-prefixed contact (TEST_Retest User / test_retest@example.com) via /api/contact during regression.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both iteration-1 bugs are fully fixed. Mobile menu uses inline style backgroundColor:#ffffff + z-[100]. Contact.jsx removed `required` attr and relies on JS validation + sonner toast. Backend /api/contact and /api/contacts are stable (8 pytest tests).
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — prior bugs already resolved by main agent.
